title: Number of Visible People in a Queue
titleCn: 队列中可以看到的人数

testcases.input: heights = [10,6,8,5,11,9] Output: [3,1,2,1,1,0] Explanation: Person 0 can see person 1, 2, and 4. Person 1 can see person 2. Person 2 can see person 3 and 4. Person 3 can see person 4. Person 4 can see person 5. Person 5 can see no one since nobody is to the right of them.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,1,2,1,1,0] Explanation: Person 0 can see person 1, 2, and 4. Person 1 can see person 2. Person 2 can see person 3 and 4. Person 3 can see person 4. Person 4 can see person 5. Person 5 can see no one since nobody is to the right of them.
